GET restapi/personal/studentplan/achievementgoals/coursewide/v1

Request Information

URI Parameters

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.StudentPlan.AchievementGoals.CourseWideAchievementGoal
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
GoalId

The goal identifier.

 integer

None.
Description

The description.

 string

None.
Course

The course.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.StudentPlan.StudentPlanCourseSimple

None.
TeacherAssessment

The teacher assessment.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.StudentPlan.AchievementGoals.AchievementGoalAssessment

None.
StudentAssessment

The student assessment.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.StudentPlan.AchievementGoals.AchievementGoalAssessment

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
[
  {
    "GoalId": 1,
    "Description": "sample string 2",
    "Course": {
      "Id": 1,
      "Title": "sample string 2",
      "Color": "sample string 3"
    },
    "TeacherAssessment": {
      "AssessmentPerson": {
        "PersonName": "sample string 1",
        "ProfileImageUrl": "sample string 2"
      },
      "AssessmentTitle": "sample string 1",
      "AssessmentLevel": 2
    },
    "StudentAssessment": {
      "AssessmentPerson": {
        "PersonName": "sample string 1",
        "ProfileImageUrl": "sample string 2"
      },
      "AssessmentTitle": "sample string 1",
      "AssessmentLevel": 2
    }
  },
  {
    "GoalId": 1,
    "Description": "sample string 2",
    "Course": {
      "Id": 1,
      "Title": "sample string 2",
      "Color": "sample string 3"
    },
    "TeacherAssessment": {
      "AssessmentPerson": {
        "PersonName": "sample string 1",
        "ProfileImageUrl": "sample string 2"
      },
      "AssessmentTitle": "sample string 1",
      "AssessmentLevel": 2
    },
    "StudentAssessment": {
      "AssessmentPerson": {
        "PersonName": "sample string 1",
        "ProfileImageUrl": "sample string 2"
      },
      "AssessmentTitle": "sample string 1",
      "AssessmentLevel": 2
    }
  }
]

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<ArrayOfCourseWideAchievementGoal xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <CourseWideAchievementGoal>
    <Course>
      <Color>sample string 3</Color>
      <Id>1</Id>
      <Title>sample string 2</Title>
    </Course>
    <Description>sample string 2</Description>
    <GoalId>1</GoalId>
    <StudentAssessment>
      <AssessmentLevel>2</AssessmentLevel>
      <AssessmentPerson>
        <PersonName>sample string 1</PersonName>
        <ProfileImageUrl>sample string 2</ProfileImageUrl>
      </AssessmentPerson>
      <AssessmentTitle>sample string 1</AssessmentTitle>
    </StudentAssessment>
    <TeacherAssessment>
      <AssessmentLevel>2</AssessmentLevel>
      <AssessmentPerson>
        <PersonName>sample string 1</PersonName>
        <ProfileImageUrl>sample string 2</ProfileImageUrl>
      </AssessmentPerson>
      <AssessmentTitle>sample string 1</AssessmentTitle>
    </TeacherAssessment>
  </CourseWideAchievementGoal>
  <CourseWideAchievementGoal>
    <Course>
      <Color>sample string 3</Color>
      <Id>1</Id>
      <Title>sample string 2</Title>
    </Course>
    <Description>sample string 2</Description>
    <GoalId>1</GoalId>
    <StudentAssessment>
      <AssessmentLevel>2</AssessmentLevel>
      <AssessmentPerson>
        <PersonName>sample string 1</PersonName>
        <ProfileImageUrl>sample string 2</ProfileImageUrl>
      </AssessmentPerson>
      <AssessmentTitle>sample string 1</AssessmentTitle>
    </StudentAssessment>
    <TeacherAssessment>
      <AssessmentLevel>2</AssessmentLevel>
      <AssessmentPerson>
        <PersonName>sample string 1</PersonName>
        <ProfileImageUrl>sample string 2</ProfileImageUrl>
      </AssessmentPerson>
      <AssessmentTitle>sample string 1</AssessmentTitle>
    </TeacherAssessment>
  </CourseWideAchievementGoal>
</ArrayOfCourseWideAchievementGoal>
